nasb.text: He will die for lack of instruction, And in the greatness of his folly he will go astray.

esv.text: He dies for lack of discipline, and because of his great folly he is led astray.

cnv.text: 他必因不受管教而死亡， 又因自己過分愚妄而走進歧途。

ccb.text: 他因不听教诲而丧命， 因极其愚妄而入歧途。

csbs.text: 他必因不受管教而死亡， 因自己极度愚妄而迷失。
